    Description
    javafx.collections.ObservableList<Device>
    Room.getDevices()
    Returns the devices assigned to the room.
    Methods in at.jku.se.smarthome.model with parameters of type Device
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Room.addDevice(Device device)
    Adds a device to the room and refreshes the count.
    void
    Room.removeDevice(Device device)
    Removes a device from the room and refreshes the count.
